goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'stevenage' and should leave on 'friday'.
The train should go to 'cambridge' and should 'arrive by 11:00'.
Make sure you get 'departure time' and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'moderate' price range and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'guesthouse'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '2 people' and '5 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from stevenage and should leave on friday
The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 11:00
Make sure you get departure time and travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the moderate price range and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the type of guesthouse
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 5 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
